subject: Charged twice for my subscription
body: I was billed $49.99 two times this month for the same Pro plan subscription. Can you refund the duplicate charge?

subject: URGENT: card declined and account about to be suspended
body: Your system says my card was declined and my account will be suspended in 24 hours, but I have plenty of funds. This is blocking my whole team from working today.

subject: Question about invoice line item
body: There's a line item on last month's invoice labeled 'usage overage' that I don't understand. Could someone explain what it covers?

subject: Need to update payment method before renewal
body: My plan renews in three days and I need to switch to a new company card before then, otherwise the renewal will fail.

subject: Requesting a copy of last year's receipts for taxes
body: For our accounting records, could you send over PDF receipts for all of last year's invoices? No rush, whenever is convenient.

subject: Downgrade plan mid-cycle and get a prorated refund
body: We want to move from the Team plan to the Starter plan right away and would like the difference refunded on a prorated basis.

subject: Billing address is wrong on my invoices
body: The billing address on my last two invoices shows our old office. Please update it to our new address for future invoices.

subject: Trial converted to paid plan without warning
body: My free trial silently converted to a paid annual plan and charged my card $588 without any confirmation email. I need this reversed today.

subject: Production API returning 500 errors for all requests
body: Every request to your API has been returning HTTP 500 for the last 20 minutes. Our production integration is completely down.

subject: Dashboard chart not loading in Safari
body: The usage chart on the dashboard just shows a spinner forever in Safari, but it works fine in Chrome. Not urgent, just annoying.

subject: Webhook deliveries failing intermittently
body: About 1 in 10 of our webhook deliveries are failing with a timeout. It's causing occasional data gaps but the app still mostly works.

subject: Can't log in — password reset email never arrives
body: I've requested a password reset three times and the email never shows up, not even in spam. I'm locked out of my account.

subject: Feature request: dark mode for the dashboard
body: It would be great if the dashboard supported a dark theme. Just a nice-to-have, no rush at all.

subject: Data export stuck at 'processing' for two days
body: I requested a full data export two days ago and it still shows 'processing'. I need this data for a board meeting tomorrow morning.

subject: Mobile app crashes on opening ticket details
body: The iOS app crashes every single time I tap into a ticket's detail view. Reproduces on two different phones running the latest app version.

subject: All customer data missing after this morning's outage
body: After the outage this morning, our workspace shows zero tickets and zero customers — everything appears to have been wiped. This is a total emergency.

subject: Need to transfer ownership of the workspace
body: Our admin left the company. Could you help transfer workspace ownership to me? I have manager access already.

subject: How do I add a new teammate to my plan?
body: I'd like to invite a new hire to our workspace next week. What's the process for adding a seat?

subject: Suspicious login alert — was this me?
body: I got an alert about a login from a country I've never visited. I'm worried my account may have been compromised and need this looked at right away.

subject: Please delete my account and all associated data
body: We've decided to stop using the product. Please delete my account and all our data per GDPR within the required timeframe.

subject: Can I merge two workspaces into one?
body: We ended up with two separate workspaces after a reorg. Is it possible to merge them, and if so, how long does that typically take?

subject: Two-factor authentication locked me out
body: I lost access to my authenticator app after switching phones and now I can't get past 2FA to log in. I need access restored today for payroll.

subject: Change my account email address
body: I switched jobs and need to update the email tied to my account from my old work address to my new one.

subject: How do I export my personal settings before leaving the team?
body: I'm moving to a different team internally and want to know if there's a way to export my personal dashboard settings first. No rush.

subject: Do you offer a nonprofit discount?
body: We're a registered nonprofit and were wondering if you offer any discount on the Team plan for organizations like ours.

subject: What are your support hours?
body: Just curious what hours your support team is available and whether you offer weekend coverage.

subject: Requesting a product roadmap briefing for our renewal
body: Ahead of our contract renewal next quarter, our leadership would like a short briefing on your product roadmap for the next year.

subject: Do you have a status page for incidents?
body: Is there a public status page where we can check for ongoing incidents instead of opening a ticket every time something seems slow?

subject: Can we schedule a call to discuss enterprise pricing?
body: Our company is growing quickly and we'd like to talk to someone about enterprise-tier pricing sometime in the next couple of weeks.

subject: Is there a public API changelog?
body: Wondering if there's somewhere we can subscribe to see upcoming and past changes to the public API.

subject: Feedback on your onboarding flow
body: Just wanted to pass along some feedback — the onboarding checklist was really clear and helped our team get set up fast. Nice work!

subject: Are you SOC 2 compliant?
body: Our security team needs to confirm SOC 2 Type II compliance before we can move forward with a larger contract. Could you share your report or certification?
